title: I Can Stay Up Late!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I blast off like a rocket—*zoom*!
Socks fly up, then *splat* on the room!
Dino soars—*crash*—what a fight!
Dad just grins and turns on the light!

[chorus]
I can stay up late!
Dance and shout and celebrate!
One more hour—don’t say no!
Gonna watch the lights aglow!

[verse 2]
Popcorn bowl’s my trampoline!
Mom just laughs—she’s turning green!
Spin so fast I see the stars—
*Bam!* Right into the toy cars!

[chorus]
I can stay up late!
Dance and shout and celebrate!
One more hour—don’t say no!
Gonna watch the lights aglow!

[ending]
Now my legs feel wobbly weak.
Snuggle in—my eyes can’t peek.
One more hour… turned to three.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, piano, bass, and drums, 115 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The living room clock strikes 9:15 PM, its glowing hands suddenly irrelevant as Dad grins and says, "Alright, one more hour—*"—I shriek, launching off the couch, socks skidding on the shag rug, arms windmilling like I’ve just won the World Cup, my stuffed dinosaur flying from the force of my spin. The lamp’s warm light spills over the scattered board game pieces, the half-eaten bowl of popcorn, and Mom’s laughing face as she shields her eyes from my airborne joy.
cover_description: Kid mid-spin, socks flying, dino in the air, popcorn bowl tipped, clock glowing 9:15.
